title: CADA Annex III — audit evidence for the audit procedure
description: Annex III lists eleven audit criteria (A-K), each identifying the Annex II paragraph(s) it assesses and the evidence items an auditing organisation should request. Extraction only, no interpretation (Phase 2c scope) — this feeds the evidence-tier machinery and the inherit disposition in later phases. Numbered/lettered/roman sub-items within a single evidence item are kept inline in that item's text as printed in the source, rather than introducing further nested schema structure (a schema-fit choice, like Annex II's sub-criteria — see METHODOLOGY.md).

assesses_annex_ii_paragraph.description: The Annex II lettered paragraph this criterion assesses, e.g. 'paragraph (a)' — assessed under Union assurance levels 2, 3 and 4 per Annex III's own framing for every criterion A-K.

notes.description: Optional clarifying 'NB' definitions Annex III attaches to some criteria (e.g. criterion B's definitions of Infrastructure/Assets/Personnel, criterion C's definitions of customer/customer data).
